trait.name: Shatter on the Ramparts
trait.effect: Once a round, when you push or pull a foe into an obstruction, you may deal damage to them equal to the round number +1.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

limitBreak.name: Gatebreaker
limitBreak.effect:
You sprint into a mighty charge, blowing away all opposing forces.
Effect along the line with unstoppable until you would enter the space of a character, then stop moving.
• You may enter the spaces of objects during this movement without stopping, and destroy and remove them if you do.
• If you would enter the space of a character, that character must save. They take 2d6 damage on a failed save, half damage on a successful save, and are pushed the number of spaces you moved before entering their space.
Impact takes damage equal to twice the spaces you moved and is stunned.

keywords.name: Impact
keywords.description: Triggers on any character moved into an obstruction as part of this ability.
